title: eurotia pungens
intro: Eurotia pungens, also known as prickly saltwort, is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eurotia pungens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, and alleviating pain and inflammation. Eurotia pungens is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
